title: forsythia × vitellina
intro: Forsythia × vitellina, also known as Forsythia, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the olive family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Forsythia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. Forsythia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
